mapper.select: SELECT NTNL COUNTRY FROM GLB_ATM_MGT GROUP BY NTNL ORDER BY NTNL WITH UR
SELECT NTNL COUNTRY , CITY REGION FROM GLB_ATM_MGT GROUP BY NTNL, CITY HAVING NTNL = #{ntnl} ORDER BY CITY WITH UR
SELECT NTNL COUNTRY , CITY REGION , LOCAL AS AREA FROM GLB_ATM_MGT GROUP BY NTNL, CITY, LOCAL HAVING NTNL = #{ntnl} AND CITY = #{city} ORDER BY AREA WITH UR
